payload.title: The Immutable Ledger
payload.description: Implement the core append-only storage primitive (LOG). Must serialize events as JSONL or similar machine-readable stream.

payload.title: The View Materializer
payload.description: A background function that reads the event ledger and computes the current JSON state of a node (GET/PUT equivalent without destructive truth loss).

payload.title: The Semantic Indexer
payload.description: A background process that automatically embeds materialized nodes for probabilistic discovery (SEARCH).

payload.title: The Graph Traverser
payload.description: The relational query engine for explicitly walking topology (TRAVERSE) based on node edges.

payload.title: Opaque Compute Tools
payload.description: Implementations of QueryNode and ExtractSchema that can execute against local/remote data without dumping it all into context.
